sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14865" key="a)rguropoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργῠρο-ποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">production of silver,</tr_> in Alchemy, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl>Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.49B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.49B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
